who: restaurant back office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For restaurant back office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments and supplier penalties. We streamline the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation of purchase orders and invoices leads to errors and delays
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where restaurant back office managers seek help
Indie Hackers posts and comments on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 restaurant back office managers with demo video
Community forums/groups where restaurant back office managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for purchase orders and invoices on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
